title: aerangis calantha
intro: Aerangis calantha, also known as the African orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aerangis calantha include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Aerangis calantha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
